title: will i really have to wait a year to see 30
display_title: will i really have to wait a year to see 30
wikitext:
[]: will i really have to wait a year to see 3.0 ? Post by UBERGEEKZILLA » Thu Oct 18, 2012 3:46 pm like everyone else i am eagerly anticipated the release of 3.0 however i live in america and the film wont be in america until a year or 2. so what do i do? is there any way at all that i can see it. will it possibly be uploaded on youtube? i really dont want to wait an extra year for this movie.

[]: Re: will i really have to wait a year to see 3.0 ? Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu Oct 18, 2012 3:48 pm UBERGEEKZILLA wrote: like everyone else i am eagerly anticipated the release of 3.0 however i live in america and the film wont be in america until a year or 2. so what do i do? is there any way at all that i can see it. will it possibly be uploaded on youtube? i really dont want to wait an extra year for this movie.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 18, 2012 4:11 pm The release of Evangelion 3.0 has been very tightly controlled, and unlike western countries, Japan is very tough on piracy in theaters. Aside from flying to Japan, the first good opportunity you'll have to watch the film will probably be about 9 months after it is released to theaters, which is when the Japanese home video release will be out, and will get fansubbed to hell and back.
